name: Catfish and Crawfish Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the catfish and crawfish in a food processor.
2. In a large bowl, combine the chopped catfish and crawfish, white wine, parsley, lemon juice, and salt. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
3. Add the Louisiana hot sauce and Lea & Perrins Worcestershire sauce to the mixture. Stir until everything is well combined.
4. Gradually fold in the cream cheese until fully integrated into the seafood mixture.
5. Transfer the mixture to a mold, cover with plastic wrap or aluminum foil, and refrigerate for at least 8 hours (overnight is best).
6. When ready to serve, remove from the refrigerator and garnish with crackers or place on a bed of lettuce.
You can substitute shrimp for crawfish if necessary.
